legal.title: Important Legal Notice
legal.text: This is an educational and information tool, not medical software. Medyra explains what medical terms mean but does not provide medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment recommendations. Always consult your licensed physician before making any health decisions. Your data is handled in compliance with GDPR and automatically deleted after 30 days.

footer.tagline: Understanding your health, one report at a time
footer.copyright: © 2025 Medyra. Made with love in Germany.
